name: Illinois IDFPR Roofing Contractor License Lookup

agency.name: Illinois Department of Financial and Professional Regulation

updateFrequency: The IDFPR lookup page describes regular updates, including daily updates for single-license lookup and weekly updates for bulk lookup unless otherwise noted; verify current source text before relying on freshness assumptions.
licenseTypesIncluded: Illinois roofing contractor license records exposed by IDFPR lookup paths
knownExclusions: This source entry is scoped to IDFPR roofing contractor licensing and does not represent every Illinois construction trade, local contractor license, permit, or business registration.
The broader IDFPR lookup spans many professions and divisions; adapter work must filter roofing contractor records carefully.
Bulk lookup availability and redistribution posture require follow-up review before generated datasets are published.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Future access should prefer official bulk lookup options where lawful and technically stable, and keep live access opt-in.
publicRecordsNotes: Official IDFPR lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, local authorization, or non-roofing trade credential does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: IDFPR documents bulk license lookup options for some divisions. The exact roofing contractor export path, terms, and columns need follow-up research before adapter work.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Illinois roofing contractor licensing. Future work should decide whether other Illinois trade sources need separate entries.
maintainerNotes: Keep Illinois roofing scope explicit; do not describe this entry as all Illinois contractor coverage.
